# Pittman's Enterprises Limited (Pittmans)

> Second-generation architectural, heavy civil, marine, and electrical contractors, building across Newfoundland and Labrador, Canada since 1978. 300+ completed projects. Turnkey, foundation to finish.

Head office: St. Paul's, NL (Gros Morne National Park area). Operating anywhere in Newfoundland & Labrador.
Phone: 709-243-2666 · Email: info@pittmans.ca

## What we do
- Architectural general contracting: performing arts centres, schools, arenas, public buildings (steel, wood, masonry; Behlen pre-engineered steel buildings)
- Heavy civil and earthworks: excavation, roads, site development, structural fills, underground services
- Marine infrastructure: wharves, dredging, marine concrete; specialty in armour stone breakwaters and coastal protection
- Electrical: licensed commercial and industrial contracting, in-house
- Blasting and crushing: licensed drill/blast, mobile crushing and screening, aggregate supply with placement
- Mining and remote sites: camps, pads, access development anywhere; company float capacity to 75 tonnes

## Technology
GPS machine control; robotic total station; autonomous marine survey vessel; underwater ROV; drone photogrammetry; 3D and dynamic structural modelling.

## Notable projects
- Nurse Myra Bennett Centre for the Performing Arts, Cow Head (2021): 2,000 m2, 178-seat theatre, built from scratch
- Seven Corners Lookout, Gros Morne National Park: sculptural timber viewing structures
- Schools, arenas and public buildings across the province
- Wharf construction at Pinsent's Arm, Labrador
- Municipal water, sewer and road infrastructure
- Mining exploration camp and pad construction, coastal Labrador
